Saneject
Table of Contents

Class UserSettings

Namespace
Plugins.Saneject.Runtime.Settings
Assembly
Saneject.Runtime.dll

Provides access to user-scoped Saneject settings stored locally in UnityEditor.EditorPrefs.

public static class UserSettings
Inheritance
object
UserSettings

Remarks

These settings are personal to the current Unity user on the current machine. They can be changed only in Edit Mode and fall back to default values outside the Unity Editor.

Properties

AskBeforeBatchInject

Show a confirmation dialog before batch injecting scenes and prefab assets.

public static bool AskBeforeBatchInject { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

AskBeforeInjectPrefabAsset

Show a confirmation dialog before injecting a prefab asset.

public static bool AskBeforeInjectPrefabAsset { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

AskBeforeInjectScene

Show a confirmation dialog before injecting a whole scene.

public static bool AskBeforeInjectScene { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

AskBeforeInjectSelectedSceneHierarchies

Show a confirmation dialog before injecting selected scene hierarchies.

public static bool AskBeforeInjectSelectedSceneHierarchies { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

ClearLogsOnInjection

Clear console logs before injection starts. Useful for only seeing logs related to the latest injection run.

public static bool ClearLogsOnInjection { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

LogGlobalScopeRegistration

Logs global registration lifecycle events in GlobalScope at runtime.

public static bool LogGlobalScopeRegistration { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

LogInjectionSummary

Logs the end-of-run injection summary.

public static bool LogInjectionSummary { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

LogProxyResolve

Logs when a runtime proxy resolves its runtime instance.

public static bool LogProxyResolve { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

LogUnusedBindings

Log a message when a binding is unused during injection. This can happen when a binding is registered in a scope but never used in the scene or prefab.

public static bool LogUnusedBindings { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

LogUnusedRuntimeProxiesOnDomainReload

On domain reload, scans for runtime proxy assets and scripts not referenced by any scope binding and logs the findings.

public static bool LogUnusedRuntimeProxiesOnDomainReload { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

ShowHelpBoxes

Shows explanatory Saneject help boxes in inspectors.

public static bool ShowHelpBoxes { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

ShowInjectedFieldsProperties

Show [Inject] fields and [field: Inject] auto-properties in the Inspector.

public static bool ShowInjectedFieldsProperties { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Methods

UseDefaultSettings()

Resets all user settings to their default values.

public static void UseDefaultSettings()
